title: Metrics that matter. Not vanity growth.
subtitle: We measure whether AI is actually doing the work — not whether headcount grew.

leading.label: Human Review Time
leading.desc: Time humans spend reviewing AI decisions per task. Target: near zero.
Interactions fully resolved by the agent without escalation.
Agent decisions above minimum confidence before acting.
Business processes with live AI agent coverage.

lagging.desc: Must rise each quarter — the true test of AI impact.
AI compute and human review costs included. Target 50%+ margin at scale.
How many simultaneous engagements one team runs with AI support.
